subcodes.title: Concerning Body, Soul and Spirit: Words spoken on 1911-11-17 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: There are in the world of humanity three degrees; those of the body, the soul, and spirit. The body is the physical or animal degree of man.
subcodes.first_line_orig: در عالم انسانی سه مقام است مقام جسم است و آن مقام حیوانی انسانست که با جمیع
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @man's distinction from the animal, @mind as intermediary between soul and body, @attaining the life of the spirit, @two kinds of civilization; material and spiritual civilization
